name: Enclosed
compose:
name: slashnode-enclosed
services:
  web:
    image: corentinth/enclosed:1.16.0-rootless
    container_name: enclosed
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - web_data:/app/.data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8788:8787
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-enclosed_web_data
